description: Gentle land of mild seasons and green plenty, where life grows easily and the countryside feels like it was made for settling.
biomes: Broad-leafed trees that shift with the seasons, carpeting the ground in gold each autumn and greening again come spring.
Oak and pine growing side by side on gentle slopes. The undergrowth is thick and the birdsong changes with every hundred paces.
Rich bottomland fed by a winding river. The soil is dark, the grass is tall, and the water never runs dry.
Rolling green fields dotted with grazing animals and low stone walls. Smoke rises from distant chimneys and the pace is slow.
A blanket of color spreading across soft hills. The air hums with bees and the scent changes with every breeze.
Easy hills covered in soft grass that invite you to keep walking. The views are pleasant and the paths well-worn.
Scattered old trees standing in open grass, spaced as if planted by a careful hand. Dappled shade falls in wide circles.
